The '''Yimi''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], diminutive [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with large skulls that were indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kathol (planet)|Kathol]]. They were created by the [[DarkStryder]] and contained large brains which were flash-printed with necessary skills. The species was created to be extremely loyal to their creator. Despite their complex brains, they were unable to learn new skills that were not flash-printed. It was believed that the Yimi were crafted by DarkStryder to be twisted versions of the ancient [[Kathol (species)|Kathol]] themselves, as a cruel joke on its own creators.
